title: trollius farreri var. farreri
intro: Trollius farreri var. farreri, also known as the Himalayan globeflower, is a flowering plant species native to the Himalayan Mountains in Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's roots and leaves are believed to have health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. Trollius farreri var. farreri is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for its herbal remedies, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments.
